message:
fix(wizard): add Number.isInteger validation to normalizeCompletedSteps

The normalizeCompletedSteps function was missing an integer check that
exists in the equivalent normalizeCompletedLessons function in
lessonProgress.ts. Without this check, fractional numbers like 1.5
could pass validation and be stored as completed wizard steps.

Changes:
- Added Number.isInteger(n) check to the type guard filter
- Changed parameter type to `readonly unknown[]` for consistency with
  lessonProgress.ts

This ensures parity between the two similar validation functions and
prevents potential edge cases from corrupted localStorage data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
